title: Air
description: Build your own jets, tanks, helicopters, boats and weapons to fight epic fights against others to secure your dominance on the server!
body:
# **Minecraft Air - a project by Gamerherz**

![Downlaod count Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/619696?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=D02F2F) ![Downlaod count Modrnith](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Gqfl61bY?style=for-the-badge&logo=Modrinth&color=D02F2F) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/866268252245590016?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&color=D02F2F&link=https://discord.com/invite/Z3rrqYSpUE&link=https://discord.com/invite/Z3rrqYSpUE)

**Minecraft Air** is the ultimate modpack for anyone looking for **epic multiplayer wars**! Imagine soaring above the clouds, building the most **insane war machines** Minecraft has ever seen, either with your team or solo.

Create **jets, tanks, helicopters, guns, boats** and **deadly defense systems** that'll strike fear into your enemies. This modpack gives you the freedom to **unleash** your **military strategies** in a whole new dimension. Whether you prefer to chase through the skies in a jet or dominate the battlefield from the ground with heavy weapons – everything is possible here!

Dive into **unforgettable adventures** and **face thrilling battles** that'll put your skills to the test. Minecraft Air is the perfect starting point for anyone who loves **action** and **strategy** in Minecraft.

Get ready, the sky is yours!


## **🗄️ You need a Server? 🗄️**

Buy a Server at Kinect Hosting! With the code **Gamerherz** you **save 25%** off your order!
Us this link (*affiliate link): [kinetichosting.net](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1166) ![Kinetic Hsoting Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69c5ff58ef061c0e6fadee4a7a4a8f00e3fcaf3_0.webp)


## **⚠️Notes:⚠️**
⚠️ Note, if you want to use a **shader** then you need to **install optfine manually** and **delete relictium** (NOT recommend; worse performance). In order to **use Replay Mod** correctly you need to **install ffmpeg manually**. Instructions can be found here: https://www.replaymod.com/docs/#installing-ffmpeg

⚠️ The Modrinth Version does **NOT** contain **[Farsight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farsight)**! Either install it manually **or** download the [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/minecraft-air)!

⚠️ [Click here to download the Serverpack from Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/minecraft-air/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&showAlphaFiles=hide)

⚠️ All pictures were made in a custom world.

⚠️ We do **NOT** support war!

⚠️ Note, this project is **copyrighted** but you **CAN** use this for your friends and on Youtube (and similiar stuff) but please **give me credits** and **link to this Modpack**!

You **found** an **issue**? Please **contact us** per Discord.
